nasb.text: It is drawn forth and comes out of his back, Even the glittering point from his gall. Terrors come upon him,

esv.text: It is drawn forth and comes out of his body; the glittering point comes out of his gallbladder; terrors come upon him.

cnv.text: 他把箭一抽，箭就從背後出來， 發亮的箭頭從他的膽中出來， 死亡的驚恐臨到他身上。

ccb.text: 利箭穿透他的后背， 闪亮的箭头刺破他的胆囊， 恐怖笼罩着他。
